title: Energizing Chinese Dough Naan
description: A quick and easy recipe for a delicious and energizing Chinese-style naan dough.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast and warm water.
Let it sit for 5-7 minutes until yeast is activated.
Add dough flour, sugar, salt, and five-spice powder to the bowl.
Mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1-2 hours, or until doubled in size.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Divide the dough into 6-8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it into a disk shape.
Cook the naan for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown and puffed.
Brush with melted butter or cooking oil if desired.
